matches.name: Walmart
matches.description: The company emphasizes price leadership and everyday low cost (EDLP/EDLC) and a massive physical and digital footprint (11,500+ stores, e-commerce in 11 countries) that create purchasing, distribution and cost advantages that are reinforcing and difficult for competitors to replicate.
